name: Browser Session
description: Create a browser session. WebView uses the embedded browser. Playwright uses a separate Chromium instance (requires Playwright service running).
doc:
Start a browser session for web automation.

Modes:
• WebView (Embedded) - uses the app's built-in browser panel. Visible and interactive.
• Playwright (Headless) - uses separate Chromium browser. Better for automation at scale.

Features:
• Choose user agent (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
• Custom user agent support
• Session persists across control actions

Playwright Setup:
Requires Playwright service running on localhost:8769. Set PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS=false in service .env to see the browser.

properties.name: Browser Mode
properties.description: WebView: Uses embedded browser panel. Playwright: Uses separate Chromium via service.

properties.name: Playwright URL
properties.description: URL of the Playwright service. Set PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS=false in service .env for visible browser.
